sections.biography-sanguo-yanyi: Cai Xun guarded the south road to stop Liu Bei escaping in Cai Mao’s plot but Liu Bei fled west and over the river. Cai Xun later served Wei when Liu Cong surrendered and was at Chi Bi when Wei attacked Wu’s navy. When Gan Ning issued a challenged, Cai Xun responded but was shot as he approached.

full_text:
Cai Xun 蔡壎
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Cai Xun (蔡壎)was born in Nan. Relative of Cai Mao, killed with an arrow by Gan Ning in a navy battle. Cai Xun is a fictional character. Cai Xun was affiliated with Liu Biao and the Wei Kingdom. Cai Xun lived during the Later Han Dynasty periods of Chinese history.

BiographySanguo Yanyi
Cai Xun guarded the south road to stop Liu Bei escaping in Cai Mao’s plot but Liu Bei fled west and over the river. Cai Xun later served Wei when Liu Cong surrendered and was at Chi Bi when Wei attacked Wu’s navy. When Gan Ning issued a challenged, Cai Xun responded but was shot as he approached.
